name: tier-c/cpp/01-cmake-add-subdirectory-positive
description: Positive case: root CMakeLists.txt with three add_subdirectory() calls; each subdir has its own CMakeLists.txt. Single-level resolution per §1.11.

manifests.CMakeLists.txt:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(umbrella CXX)
add_subdirectory(libA)
add_subdirectory(libB)
add_subdirectory(app)
manifests.app/CMakeLists.txt:
add_executable(app src/main.cpp)
target_link_libraries(app PRIVATE libA libB)
